title: The First Drop
story: Jay, Theo, and Mina test whether the neighborhood drops are real and discover the first package mid-route.
briefingTranscript: Something in the neighborhood is off. Specific things go missing and sometimes specific things show up.
The route matters. Timing matters. If the drop is real, they have one shot to find it without looking obvious.
Stay moving, stay casual, and trust the route long enough to see if the pattern breaks open.

artifact.title: The First Drop
artifact.summary: A sealed package confirms the route pattern is real and intentional.
artifact.unlockCondition: Reach the first drop before the end of the route.

options.label: It was probably random
options.outcomeText: You downplay the find. The team loses some momentum and the pattern stays blurry.

options.label: There is a real drop system
options.outcomeText: You call it correctly. The package turns the rumor into a live lead, and the team commits to the game.

options.label: Something is happening, but we need another run
options.outcomeText: You log the find carefully. It is enough to continue, but not enough to own the story yet.

sideMissions.label: Stay Casual
sideMissions.promptText: Do not change pace too much. Blend in.
sideMissions.successText: Nice. You do not look suspicious at all.
sideMissions.failureText: Okay yeah... that was a little obvious.

sideMissions.label: Rush the Window
sideMissions.promptText: Pick it up a little. If this is real, the window is short.
sideMissions.failureText: We might be cutting it close.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Hey... quick question. You ever notice stuff goes missing around here?

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: Like my snacks? Yeah. Tragic.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: No, not random stuff. Specific stuff.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: And sometimes... stuff shows up.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Let us just take a walk. I will show you.

beats.title: Objective updated
beats.text: Follow the route.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: Look around when you walk. Corners, signs, benches.

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: You are saying people just... leave things?

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: I think they are meant to be found.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Do not change your pace too much. Just blend in.

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: So how do people know where to go?

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: That is the thing. I think it is timed.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: If you are early, nothing is there. If you are late, someone else got it.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: If this is real, we might be close. Pick it up a little.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: Alright... this is the spot.

beats.title: Drop found
beats.text: Audio cue: drop found.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: Do not stop. Grab it and keep moving.

beats.speaker: Theo
beats.text: What is this?

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: I do not know yet.

beats.speaker: Mina
beats.text: But now we know it is real.

beats.speaker: Jay
beats.text: And if there is one, there is more.
